title: Hammer Enchant
description: Datapack that adds a Hammer enchantment which allows you to mine multiple blocks at once
body:
# Hammer Enchant
Heyy, this is a simple datapack that adds a new enchantment which allows you to mine multiple blocks at once!

<details>
<summary>1.21</summary>
  
## How does it work
The enchant works in all directions, even up and down. The blocks will be destroyed depending on where you are looking.

**// New 1.21 Feature //**
The enchantment now has 3 levels:
- Level 1 : mines in a 2x1
- Level 2 : mines in a cross patern
- Level 3 : mines in a 3x3

Levels Showcase
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/UTEmIU55VEI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## How to obtain the enchantment
**// New 1.21 Feature //**
You can now get the enchantment as you would for any other vanilla ones:
- In the enchanting table (Only levels 1 and 2)
- With villager trading (All levels, Cost doubled)
- In random loot although rare considering the levels required to get the enchantment

## Useful facts about the enchantment
- The enchantment will take in consideration the components of your tool. This means all enchantments and more. Meaning it is compatible with fortune, silk touch and even both at the same time.
- The enchantment works with all pickaxe breakable blocks and glass blocks but doesn't work for all table blocks like furnaces, anvil, etc.

<details>
<summary>v.1.2.1 and up</summary>
  
- All crops now work with the hoe
- Using the hoe on crops will always break block horizontally


</details>



</details>


<details>
<summary>Before 1.21</summary>

## How to obtain the enchantment
- To obtain﻿ the enchantment you'll need to first acquire the Resize Card:
The Resize Card will drop after every time that you'll have mined 1000 blocks with a pickaxe that doesn't have the enchantment "Hammer" on it.
- Then, using the Resize Card, you'll have to go on an enchanting table while holding the card in your offhand and your pickaxe in your mainhand. It is Important to know that this enchantment currently only works with pickaxes. Implementation for other tool is on the way.
- After 5 seconds enjoying a beautiful animation, the enchantment will go on the pickaxe and you will have lost the Resize Card.

## How to use the enchantment
Simple, simply break a block and a 3x3 square will be broken with it.

## Useful facts about the enchantment
- The enchantment will take in consideration the components of your tool. This means all enchantments and more. Meaning it is compatible with fortune, silk touch and even both at the same time.
- The enchantment works with all pickaxe breakable blocks and glass blocks but doesn't work for all table blocks like furnaces, anvil, etc.

</details>



## Important message
This datapack is the start of a new project of mine which will include more enchants. Don't hesitate to share any feedback you have

**All my datapacks are compatible**

**You can modify this datapack to your likings. However, I would appreciate if you could credit me if you use my base code, thank you!**

## Known bugs or unfinished features
- The enchantment might not work properly where it would not use the right level of enchant if more than one player are in range of the same destroyed block

## Planned in the future: The higher on the list, the sooner
- Configuration menu in game
